staff_members_user_business_active_idx.name: staff_members_user_business_active_idx
staff_members_user_business_active_idx.where: "staff_members"."user_id" is not null and "staff_members"."revoked_at" is null

staff_members_email_business_active_idx.name: staff_members_email_business_active_idx
staff_members_email_business_active_idx.where: "staff_members"."email" is not null and "staff_members"."revoked_at" is null
